title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Newgen Software

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Newgen Software
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Newgen Software. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Lucknow-based team.

About Newgen Software:
Newgen Software is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Newgen Software!
